Apparel PLM - Design to Delivery - Tracker and Quality Checker           
1.   Introduction 
Our project combines development and bulk order management to transform how businesses create, manufacture, and manage large-scale orders. Our goal is to enhance operational efficiency through streamlined workflows, precise processes, and unwavering quality standards. This collaboration revolutionizes both development and bulk order fulfillment, driving innovation and efficiency in product manufacturing.
